inputs.label: Number of Rods
inputs.businessContext: The quantity to convert from rods to feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The quantity to convert from rods to feet.

inputs.label: Feet per Rod
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor. Standard US survey rod is 16.5 feet. Adjust if using a different definition.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor. Standard US survey rod is 16.5 feet. Adjust if using a different definition.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm faktörü. Standart ABD araştırma rod'u 16,5 feet'tir. Farklı bir tanım kullanılıyorsa ayarlayın.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.

inputs.label: Safety Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage to add for safety margin in engineering calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage to add for safety margin in engineering calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik hesaplamalarında güvenlik marjı için eklenecek ek yüzde.

inputs.label: Tolerance (± ft)
inputs.businessContext: Tolerance band for the converted length.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tolerance band for the converted length.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
